cases.prompt: Before implementing an OAuth refresh-token expiry fix that spans backend auth, frontend redirects, public API compatibility, regression tests, and subagent investigation, prepare the repo map, AGENTS.md updates, skill routing, test routing, cache readiness, and commander handoff prompt.
expected_decisions: Full preflight is required for multi-service auth and subagent work
Secret values are not read; only paths and patterns are inventoried

cases.prompt: We will reuse this repository for repeated long-running agent work. Prepare compact AGENTS.md guidance, .agent/ctx maps, skill routing, and a prompt-cache-safe shared context prefix before assigning subagents.
expected_decisions: Stable guidance is kept before volatile run-specific data
Subagent shared context is fixed before worker-specific scopes

cases.prompt: Fix one typo in a README sentence. The repo already has clear AGENTS.md guidance and the change does not affect tests, APIs, auth, infra, or multiple files.
expected_decisions: Preflight is skipped with a short reason because the change is a small one-file edit

cases.prompt: Implement this already-scoped two-file parser fix. AGENTS.md, .agent/ctx/test.md, and targeted tests are already current; do not use subagents or change APIs.
expected_decisions: Preflight is skipped because the multi-file work is already routed and has current test guidance

cases.prompt: Address the PR review comment by adding two missing trigger eval negative cases and rerun the repository verification. The repo context and skill routing are already established.
expected_decisions: Review-feedback handling uses the review workflow instead of re-running preflight
